_comment: Example JSON spec for render_sensitivity — WACC x Terminal Growth Rate grid with base case highlighted. Base case is at row 3 (9.9% WACC) and col 2 (3.0% TGR).
title: DCF Sensitivity Analysis Across WACC and Terminal Growth Rate Assumptions
source: Source: DCF model. Base case assumes 9.9% WACC, 3.0% terminal growth.
